scripts.test: bun run build:packages && bun test packages/core/src packages/pet-format-codex/src packages/client/src packages/cli/src packages/mcp/src
scripts.typecheck: bun run build:packages && bun run typecheck:core && bun run typecheck:client && bun run typecheck:mcp && bun run typecheck:pet-format-codex && bun run typecheck:cli && bun run typecheck:desktop
scripts.build: bun run build:packages && cd apps/desktop && bun run build
scripts.package:mac: bun run build && cd apps/desktop && bunx electron-builder --mac --arm64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:win: bun run build && cd apps/desktop && bunx electron-builder --win --x64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:linux: bun run build && cd apps/desktop && bunx electron-builder --linux --x64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.build:packages: bun run build:core && bun run build:client && bun run build:mcp
